title: EarthianBioSense (v0.4.0)
description: Biosignal acquisition and analysis for ecological coherence research. Captures heart rate variability from Polar H10 monitors, computes HRV metrics, and tracks autonomic state as a trajectory through phase space with mode classification and entrainment detection. Adds an accelerometer-derived motion channel (Polar PMD) that flags movement-confounded readings and warns of imminent BLE range loss.
